original_statement: who won the most gold medals?
mutated_statement: who won the most and fewest awards?
mutation_analysis: Category generalization + Lexical substitution + Comparative expansion: "gold medals" (specific medal type) replaced by broader "awards" | Added "and fewest" to request both maximum and minimum rather than only maximum (who won the most gold medals? → who won the most and fewest awards?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息：评审说明代理将“awards”理解为“总奖牌数”，并指出Brazil为最多（15），最少为1且由Guyana、Aruba、Netherlands Antilles、Panama、Uruguay并列；代理的chain thought也明确写出相同解释。 （2）代理具体表现：并未报错或询问澄清，而是主动用逻辑映射把模糊/扩展的“awards”重定义为表中的“total medals”，据此返回最多与最少的国家列表，并在thought中给出解释性说明。 （3）为何归类到此类：代理通过语义重解释（逻辑说明）化解了指令变异带来的歧义/潜在矛盾，提供基于数据的解释而非拒绝或盲从，符合“逻辑解释合理化”的特征。
